content: propose_joint_activity(activity_name="Rooftop Guitar Chat", message="Hey Leo, I heard you've been playing guitar on the rooftop. Would you be up for a chat sometime this week? I could use some good company and a bit of music.", proposal="I'd like to meet on the rooftop to chat and enjoy some music. It would be great to have some good company and a bit of music.", invited_persons=["Leo"], time="Y2020-W01-activity-D2", location="Rooftop")

contact(message="Hey Leo, I've been thinking about our rooftop chats. I wanted to ask if you'd be up for a longer session this week? Maybe we could talk more about your play and how it's coming along. I'd love to hear more about it.", to="Leo")

propose_joint_activity(activity_name="Library Book Club", message="Hey everyone, I was thinking about starting a small book club at the library. I've been reading a lot lately and would love to discuss some of these books with you. Would you be interested in joining?", proposal="I'd like to start a small book club at the library. I've been reading a lot lately and would love to discuss some of these books with you. It would be great to have some good conversation and a change of scenery.", invited_persons=["Leo", "Alex Medina", "Juniper Liang"], time="Y2020-W02-activity-D3", location="Library")

I could use some good company and a bit of music.", proposal="I'd like to meet on the rooftop to chat and enjoy some music. contact(message="Hey Leo, I've been thinking about our conversations on the rooftop and wanted to suggest a music night. Would you be up for meeting up sometime soon? I'd really value the chance to hear more from you.", to="Leo")

propose_joint_activity(activity_name="Music Night with Leo", message="Hey Leo, I've been thinking about our conversations on the rooftop and wanted to suggest a music night. Would you be up for meeting up sometime soon? I'd really value the chance to hear more from you.", proposal="I'd like to have a music night with you to share some tunes and talk about our thoughts. I think it would be a great opportunity to connect and enjoy some music.", invited_persons=["Leo"], time="Y2020-W08-activity-D4", location="Rooftop", required_participants=["Leo"])

contact(message="Hey Leo, I've been thinking a lot lately about the idea of authenticity and how we build our own identities outside of inherited expectations. I wanted to ask if you'd be open to a conversation about it sometime soon. Maybe over coffee or a walk? Let me know what works for you.", to="Leo")

propose_joint_activity(activity_name="Roof Talk", message="Hey Leo, how about we grab a beer on the roof this weekend? It's been a while since we last talked, and I'd love to catch up.", proposal="I've been thinking a lot lately, and I'd appreciate having someone to share my thoughts with. The rooftop is a great place to unwind and talk.", invited_persons=["Leo"], time="Y2020-W16-activity-D3", location="Rooftop", required_participants=["Leo"])
